name: Baseball Home Run : Hit & Pitch Fitness

reviews.review_description: This baseball game capture the feeling of stepping onto field. Swinging the bat feels responsive.Need to improve graphics. One mor thing i’d love to see is multiplayer or online leaderboards to make it more competitive.

Swinging doesn't feel particularly natural for what works, the pitches are more likely to be over my head than in the strike zone, I faced a bug where I got the goal points just as the timer expired so it cheered me, gave me the points, and told me that I failed. 

But it was still fun to swing at things. Yeah, balls might disappear or bounce to weird places, and so on, but still. 

Regardless, I'm hopeful that I can revisit this rating later after they've done more development.
